title: Supplementaries Compat
description: Adds compatibility between Supplementaries and many mods!
body:
**Description:** This datapack* adds compatability between many mods and Supplementaries by addding support for soups and cookies from those mods for jars and for bricks to be throwable from those mods! Additonally this datapack* works on all versions and loaders of modded minecraft (that have farmers delight of course)

**Keep in mind this is a datpack and not a resourcepack and can be more complicated to install and play with it is suggested to use a mod such as Paxi to make it simple*

**Cursforge:** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/supplementaries-compat

**Supported Mods:**
- Alex's Mobs
- Alex's Delight
- Neapolitan
- Oh The Biomes We've Gone
- Paradise Lost
- Delightful
- Tough As Nails
- Miner's Delight
- Farmer's Delight
- Twilight Delight
- Ocean's Delight
- Quark Delight
- Crabber's Delight
- My Nether's Delight
- Rainbow Reef
- Undergarden
- Aromatic
- Expanded Delight
- The Bumblezone
- Seasonals
